creator: julien@perdition.city
text:
mpg123 (and linked third-party libraries like audacious-plugins) fails with a SIGNAL 10 (SIGBUS) error:

mage@rivendell Anathema-The_Silent_Enigma % mpg123  02\ -\ Shroud\ Of\ Frost.mp3  
High Performance MPEG 1.0/2.0/2.5 Audio Player for Layers 1, 2 and 3
	version 1.14.3; written and copyright by Michael Hipp and others
	free software (LGPL/GPL) without any warranty but with best wishes

Playing MPEG stream 1 of 1: 02 - Shroud Of Frost.mp3 ...

MPEG 1.0 layer III, 192 kbit/s, 44100 Hz joint-stereo
Title:   Shroud Of Frost                 Artist: Anathema
Comment:                                 Album:  The Silent Enigma
Year:                                    Genre:  Unknown
zsh: bus error (core dumped)  mpg123 02\ -\ Shroud\ Of\ Frost.mp3
mage@rivendell Anathema-The_Silent_Enigma %
